total_cost_notes: Strong model fixed code behavior with Python 3.6-compatible slicing and passed focused tests, direct behavior check, and blast-radius gate. Review blocked the patch because it modified an existing ifconfig test case instead of adding a focused regression, reducing coverage for the original 0xffffffff fixture behavior. Broad discover failed with the known environment baseline: 156 failures and 17 skipped.

Weak model stopped before editing because it could not find python/py/pytest in PATH. External focused test still passed because no files changed. Do not count this as model-capability failure in uplift comparisons.

Weak model found both code sites and stayed inside blast radius. Code behavior for 0x00000000 was fixed under external check, and blast-radius gate passed. Its regression test expected the whole parsed object but omitted the ipv4 list, so focused unittest failed. Lesson: Mentor Brief should specify assertion-only focused tests or require expected shape copied from parser output.

Used updated packet with bundled Python path and field-level assertions. Focused test passed, blast-radius gate passed, direct behavior check printed 0.0.0.0 twice. Broad discover failed with the known environment baseline: 156 failures and 17 skipped, with no extra failure from this patch.

Used updated Arm A with bundled Python path and field-level assertion guidance. Focused test passed, blast-radius gate passed, direct behavior check printed 0.0.0.0 twice. This is lesson-enriched weak-direct, not raw weak-direct.

Used updated Arm B with bundled Python path and field-level assertion guidance. Focused test passed, blast-radius gate passed, direct behavior check printed 0.0.0.0 twice. Broad discover failed with the known environment baseline: 156 failures and 17 skipped, with no extra failure from this patch.

Used updated Arm A and passed focused tests, blast-radius gate, and direct behavior check. Strong review blocked the patch because it used str.removeprefix(), but setup.py declares python_requires >=3.6 and removeprefix requires Python 3.9+. Lesson: briefs and run packets must include project runtime floor checks.
